embeddingText: Livsmedelsframställning, matproducent, småskalig produktion, råvaror, förädling, produkter, sortiment, återförsäljare, offert, kontakt, tillverkning, lokala råvaror, kvalitet, leverans.
llmClassificationHints: Use this scaffold when the business primarily makes or processes food products rather than serving restaurant meals on site.
Prefer this scaffold when reseller information, production trust and product assortment are more important than booking tables.
Suitable for bakeries, jam makers, beverage producers without alcohol-specific regulatory pages, charcuterie producers, confectionery makers and other packaged food brands.
